title: Normandie - Niémen
writer: Konstantin Simonov, Charles Spaak, Elsa Triolet
actors: Pierre Trabaud, Roland Ménard, Giani Esposito
plot: A certain number of French fighter pilots who will not accept the Second Armistice at Compiègne nor Vichy's orders decide to join the USSR. Once they have reached Moscow they resume training and form a squadron they call "Normandi...
